PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Identify the report as a scoping review
Notes: Title includes 'Living Meta-Analysis Engine'

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Provide a structured summary including background, objectives, eligibility criteria, sources of evidence, charting methods, results, conclusions
Notes: Structured abstract: Background/Methods/Results/Conclusions

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Describe the rationale for the review
Notes: Gap between accessible and rigorous tools

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Provide an explicit statement of the questions
Notes: Integrates complete living review workflow

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Indicate whether a review protocol exists
Notes: Software tool paper; no protocol registration (tool development, not SR)

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Specify eligibility criteria
Notes: Each config has explicit inclusion/exclusion criteria

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Describe all information sources
Notes: CT.gov API v2, Europe PMC, OpenAlex, PubMed

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Present the full search strategy
Notes: Search strategies embedded in each CONFIG_LIBRARY entry

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: State the process for selecting sources of evidence
Notes: Auto-screening with confidence tiers (AUTO_VERIFIED, SPOT_CHECK, NEEDS_REVIEW)

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Describe the methods of charting data
Notes: Dual-track synthesis (HR pool + OR pool), 6 tau2 estimators

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: List and define variables
Notes: OR, HR, RR, IRR, MD, SMD, ARD, NNT/NNH with CI

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Describe methods of critical appraisal
Notes: 5-domain GRADE with automated downgrade rules

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Describe methods used to synthesize results
Notes: IV-weighted RE, MH, Peto, HKSJ, Bayesian grid approximation

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Give numbers of sources screened, assessed, included
Notes: 9 configs, 45 trials, ~200K patients

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Present characteristics of sources of evidence
Notes: Table 1 with trial counts and patient numbers per config

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Present data charted for each source
Notes: Colchicine worked example with OR, CI, tau2, I2

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Present results of critical appraisal
Notes: R parity table showing |Diff| < 0.001 for all metrics

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Present results of synthesis
Notes: Pooled OR, NNT curve, Bayesian posterior, meta-regression

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Summarize main findings
Notes: 5 unique capabilities in single distributable file

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Discuss limitations of evidence and review
Notes: 8 limitations listed including extraction ceiling, no IPD, outcome heterogeneity

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Provide general interpretation
Notes: Demonstrates complete workflow in single file with R validation

PRISMA-ScR Checklist Item: Describe sources of funding
Notes: No external funding
